Search.emptyBody: Initiate your digital experience with our intuitive dashboard
Search.noResultsBody: Refine your query to discover relevant items

Auth.termsNotice: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
Auth.heroTagline: Modern project management for engineering teams.
Auth.heroSubtitle: Plan sprints, run boards, and ship faster — all in one place.
Auth.totpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
Auth.recoveryPrompt: Enter one of your single-use recovery codes.
Auth.oauthErrorInvalidStateBody: The sign-in attempt expired or doesn't match. Please try again from the login page.
Auth.oauthErrorProviderErrorBody: We couldn't reach the sign-in provider. Try again in a moment.
Auth.oauthErrorNoEmailBody: Your account did not return an email address. Make a verified email visible on the provider and try again.
Auth.oauthErrorAccountExistsBody: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your password — once linking ships, you can connect this provider from settings.

Projects.heading: Manage projects
Projects.noMatchFilters: No projects match the current filters.
Projects.archiveConfirm:
Archive {name}?

Archived projects stay readable but won't appear in switchers by default.
Projects.deleteConfirm:
Delete {name}?

This soft-deletes the project. All its issues, sprints, and workflow stay in the database but become invisible.
Projects.emptyBody: Projects organise issues, sprints, workflows, and reports under a single key. Create one to start planning work.
Projects.dialogKeyTitle: Uppercase letters and digits only; must start with a letter.

Board.filterSearchAriaLabel: Filter tasks by title or issue key
Board.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace to start tracking issues on the board.
Board.columnDropEmpty: Drop or create an issue here

Backlog.filterSearchAriaLabel: Filter backlog by title or issue key
Backlog.sectionNoIssuesBacklog: No issues in the backlog. Add one to get started.
Backlog.sectionNoIssuesSprint: No issues in this sprint yet.
Backlog.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace to start grooming a backlog.

Roadmap.unscheduledWarning: {count, plural, one {# item has} other {# items have}} no start or due date and won't appear on the timeline. Open them from the backlog to set dates.
Roadmap.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace to start mapping out a roadmap.
Roadmap.emptyRoadmapBody: Tasks appear on the roadmap once they have a start or due date. Open an issue from the backlog and set its dates to see it here.
Roadmap.noDateTitle: No start or due date — set dates to place on the timeline
Roadmap.overflowLeft: {key} is to the left — click to jump
Roadmap.overflowRight: {key} is to the right — click to jump

Epics.noMatchFilters: No epics match the current filters.
Epics.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace to start organising work into epics.
Epics.emptyEpicsBody: Epics group related stories and tasks under a single goal. Create one to start mapping out larger initiatives.

Versions.noMatchFilters: No versions match the current filters.
Versions.deleteConfirm:
Delete version "{name}"?

This won't remove the issues themselves — they'll just be detached from this version.
Versions.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace to start tracking releases as versions.
Versions.emptyVersionsBody: Versions group issues into a release. Create one to start tracking what's shipping when.

Workflows.createPanelDesc: A workflow defines the statuses your issues can move through and the transitions between them. Start from a template — you can customise it later.
Workflows.transitionsHint: Defines which status changes are allowed
Workflows.noTransitions: No transitions defined yet. Issues can't change status until you add at least one transition below.
Workflows.deleteStatusConfirm:
Delete status "{name}"?

This will fail if any open issues are still in this status.
Workflows.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace to start defining its workflow.

Automations.noMatchFilters: No rules match the current filters.
Automations.ifHint: (all conditions must match — leave empty to fire on every event)
Automations.noConditions: No conditions — rule fires for all events.
Automations.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace, then come back to build rules that move issues for you.
Automations.emptyRulesBody: Automate repetitive work — auto-assign issues, transition them when criteria are met, send notifications, or call webhooks.

Lists.heading: List
Lists.addTaskPlaceholder: Add a task and press Enter…

Task.descriptionPlaceholder: Write a description… markdown supported (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to save, Esc to cancel)
Task.failedUpdateField: Failed to save. Please try again.

Comments.noCommentsYet: No comments yet. Be the first!

Attachments.dropzoneText: Drop files here or <browse>browse</browse> — max 25 MB
Attachments.dropzoneLabel: Drop files here or browse — max 25 MB

PullRequests.noLinkedPrs: No linked pull requests or commits.

Views.noViewsBody: Create a view to start exploring tasks in this scope.
Views.searchAriaLabel: Filter tasks by title or issue key

filters.noFilters: No filters — all tasks in scope.

Workspaces.heading: Workspaces
Workspaces.emptyBody: A workspace is a top-level container for projects, members, and settings. Create one to get started.
Workspaces.dialogSlugHint: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only.
Workspaces.dialogSlugTitle: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only
Workspaces.membersRemoveConfirm:
Remove {email} from this workspace?

They will lose access to all projects and their workspace role assignments will be cleared.
Workspaces.membersInviteEmailHint: The user must already have an account. If they don't, ask them to register first.
Workspaces.settingsSlugHint: Changing the slug will break any URLs that already reference it.
Workspaces.settingsDeleteDesc: Deleting a workspace removes all of its projects, members, and history. This action cannot be undone.
Workspaces.settingsSlugTitle: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only

Setup.welcomeDesc: Let's set up your first Workspace and Project to get started.

CustomFields.noFieldsDesc: Add fields like priority, story points, or a customer dropdown — they appear on every task in scope.
CustomFields.cascadeDesc: Custom fields cascade down to tasks in this {scope} and everything beneath it.
CustomFields.requiredCheckbox: Required (blocks marking a task Done until set)

Profile.avatarHint: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP — up to 3 MB.
Profile.avatarTooLargeDesc: Image is too large — choose a file under 3 MB.
Profile.uploadFailedDesc: Could not upload the image. Please try again.
Profile.emailCannotChange: Email cannot be changed here yet.
Profile.newPasswordMin8: New password must be at least 8 characters.
Profile.newPasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
Profile.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current one.
Profile.mfaHint: Manage MFA from the API endpoints. UI controls are coming.
Profile.connectedAccountsCardDesc: Link or unlink Google, GitHub, and other OAuth providers.

ConnectedAccounts.heading: Connected accounts
ConnectedAccounts.subheading: Sign in faster by connecting your social accounts.
ConnectedAccounts.noProvidersYet: You haven't connected any providers yet.
ConnectedAccounts.onlyCredentialTitle: This is your only credential. Set a password before disconnecting to avoid being locked out.

ProjectSettings.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace to set up labels, components, and integrations.
ProjectSettings.noLabelsBody: Labels let you tag issues with quick visual markers — bug, frontend, customer-request, etc.
ProjectSettings.noMatchesFilter: No matches for the current filter.
ProjectSettings.noComponentsBody: Components let you split a project into functional areas — Frontend, Auth, Database — and optionally assign each one a lead.
ProjectSettings.generalDesc: Identity and timeline for this project.
ProjectSettings.keyFixedHint: The project key is fixed once created — issues already reference it (e.g. {example}).
ProjectSettings.typeHint: Type affects how the board and reports render — Scrum surfaces sprints prominently; Kanban skips the sprint workflow.
ProjectSettings.lifecycleDesc: Pause work without losing data, or restore an archived project.
ProjectSettings.archiveHint: Hides the project from switchers; nothing is deleted.
ProjectSettings.archiveConfirm:
Archive {name}?

Archived projects keep all their data but disappear from default switchers. You can restore at any time.
ProjectSettings.restoreHint: Returns the project to active switchers and reports.
ProjectSettings.projectDeleted: This project is deleted and read-only.
ProjectSettings.deleteProjectDesc: Deleting a project soft-deletes its issues, sprints, and workflow. They stay in the database for audit but stop appearing in the app. This cannot be undone from the UI.
ProjectSettings.deleteProjectDescStrong: This cannot be undone from the UI.

Admin.accessRequiredBody: You don't have permission to view the admin area. Ask a workspace owner or super-admin to grant you an admin role.
Admin.deleteUserConfirm:
Permanently delete {email}?

This cannot be undone. The action will be refused if the user owns workspaces, has reported tasks, comments, attachments, or work logs — suspend them and reassign their work first.
Admin.resetPasswordConfirm:
Generate a new temporary password for {email}?

The current password will stop working immediately.
Admin.disableMfaConfirm:
Disable MFA for {email}?

The user will be able to sign in with just their password.
Admin.cuPasswordHint: If blank, a temporary password is generated and shown once after submit.
Admin.cuMarkVerified: Mark email as verified (skip verification flow)
Admin.tempPasswordWarning: This password is shown only once. Send it to the user through a secure channel and ask them to change it on first login.
Admin.userRolesNoRoles: This user has no roles assigned yet.
Admin.rolesEditorBuiltInNameHint: Built-in role names can't be changed.
Admin.rolesEditorScopeFixedHint: Scope can't be changed after creation.
Admin.rolesEditorDescPlaceholder: Short description of what this role can do
Admin.rolesEditorDeleteConfirm: Delete this role? Active assignments will block deletion.
Admin.rolesMembersNoOne: No one holds this role yet.
Admin.permissionsNoAvailable: No permissions available for this scope.

Integrations.gitConnectRepoDesc: Link GitHub or GitLab repos to this workspace. Once connected, PRs and commits that mention an issue key are auto-linked to the matching issue via webhooks.
Integrations.gitWebhookUrlHint: Paste this URL into your repo's webhook settings.
Integrations.gitWebhookSecretHint: Paste the same secret you'll enter on the provider side. Used to verify incoming webhook payloads.
Integrations.gitSetupStep1: Subscribe to Pull request and Push events on the provider side.
Integrations.gitSetupStep3: Use the URL and secret above.
Integrations.gitDisconnectConfirm:
Disconnect {repo}?

This stops auto-linking PRs and commits for this repo. The webhook on the provider side will keep firing until you remove it there.
Integrations.gitNoReposBody: Connect a GitHub or GitLab repo so commits and pull requests that mention an issue key show up on the matching issue automatically.
Integrations.slackNotifyDesc: Send a message to a channel whenever an issue is created or transitioned, or when a sprint starts or completes. Paste an Incoming Webhook URL from your Slack app or Teams connector.
Integrations.slackChannelHint: A friendly name — shown in the connection list. The actual destination is decided by the webhook URL.
Integrations.slackPickAtLeastOneEvent: Pick at least one event — otherwise the connection won't fire.
Integrations.slackRemoveConfirm:
Remove the connection for {channel}?

Messages will stop being sent. You can re-add the same webhook URL later.
Integrations.slackNoIntegrationsBody: Connect a Slack channel or Microsoft Teams channel to get pinged when issues move or sprints turn over.
Integrations.slackEventTaskCreatedDesc: A new issue is created in any project of this workspace
Integrations.slackEventTaskTransitionedDesc: An issue moves between workflow statuses
Integrations.slackEventSprintStartedDesc: A sprint enters the ACTIVE state
Integrations.webhookOutgoingDesc: Subscribe a URL to events in this workspace. Each delivery is signed with X-ProjectFlow-Signature (HMAC-SHA256 of the body using your secret), so your endpoint can verify the call is real.
Integrations.webhookNameHint: Shown in the connection list. Anything you'll recognise later.
Integrations.webhookSecretHint: Used to sign each request with X-ProjectFlow-Signature (HMAC-SHA256). Your endpoint should verify this header before trusting the payload.
Integrations.webhookPickAtLeastOneEvent: Pick at least one event — otherwise the webhook won't fire.
Integrations.webhookDeleteConfirm:
Delete webhook "{name}"?

Future events will stop being delivered. Past delivery history is also removed.
Integrations.webhookNoDeliveries: No deliveries yet. Use Ping above to send a test event, or wait for a real event to fire.
Integrations.webhookNoWebhooksBody: Forward events from this workspace to your own services — CRM sync, audit pipelines, chatops scripts. Each delivery is signed so your endpoint can verify it.
Integrations.webhookEventIssueCreatedDesc: A new task / story / bug is created
Integrations.webhookEventIssueUpdatedDesc: Any field on an existing issue changes
Integrations.webhookEventIssueDeletedDesc: An issue is soft-deleted from a project
Integrations.webhookEventSprintStartedDesc: A sprint enters the ACTIVE state
Integrations.webhookEventCommentCreatedDesc: Someone leaves a comment on an issue
Integrations.webhookEventMemberInvitedDesc: A user is added to this workspace

Dashboard.emptyProjectBody: Create a project in this workspace, then come back to see velocity, burndown, and workload insights.

Inbox.title: Inbox
Inbox.heading: Notifications
Inbox.unreadAria: {count, plural, one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}
Inbox.summaryCommentAssigned: A comment was assigned to you on {title}.
Inbox.summaryCommentAdded: A new comment was added on {title}.
Inbox.empty_all_body: When teammates assign you tasks, comment on issues you reported, or mention you, those updates land here.
Inbox.empty_unread_body: No unread notifications. Switch to All to see your history.
Inbox.empty_assigned_body: Task and comment assignments will appear here.
Inbox.empty_mentions_body: When someone @-mentions you in a comment, it will show up here.
Inbox.empty_comments_body: New comments on issues you follow will appear here.
Inbox.empty_saved_body: Save notifications for later and find them here.

Presence.viewing: {count, plural, one {# person viewing} other {# people viewing}}
Presence.typing: {count, plural, one {# person typing…} other {# people typing…}}

Relationships.invalidError: That task can't be linked here.
Relationships.typeToSearch: Type to search for a task.

Dependencies.typeToSearch: Type to search for a task.
Dependencies.circularError: That link would create a circular dependency.
Dependencies.invalidError: A task can't depend on itself.
Dependencies.blockedBody: This task can't be closed until the following blocker{count, plural, one {} other {s}} {count, plural, one {is} other {are}} done:

Recurrence.badRuleError: That recurrence rule isn't valid. Check the frequency and interval.

Templates.saveDescription: Capture this {scope} as a reusable template.
Templates.centerSubtitle: Reusable snapshots of tasks, lists, folders, and spaces.
Templates.emptyBody: Save a task, list, folder, or space as a template to reuse its structure later.
Templates.targetWorkspaceHint: This space template will be created in the current workspace.
Templates.targetEmpty: No valid destination available for this template.
Templates.anchorHint: Task dates are remapped relative to this date.
Templates.deleteConfirm: Delete template "{name}"? This can't be undone.
